ships.name: Fire Home
ships.description: Instead of having their base on a planet, Fire Corporation made a massive ship to hold all their production. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

ships.name: Short Sword
ships.description: The Short Sword is an upgraded Knife. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

ships.name: Mega Barge
ships.description: When our fans came inquiring if we were going to make a freighter, we answered with this. Here we have a lightly defended freighter built with large cargo-carrying arms. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

ships.name: Fire Assassin
ships.description: The Assassin is meant to be a use for the Particle Snipers. It has many gun ports to hold them, and brings terror from a distance. It can beat all medium warships it faces, though falters some against sheer toughness. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

ships.name: Flaming Sword
ships.description: The Flaming Sword was designed using some basic interior design stolen from Pirates Inc. It is a very powerful warship designed for one thing: destroying piracy. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

variants.name: Short Sword (Red)
variants.description: The Short Sword is an upgraded Knife. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

variants.name: Short Sword (Green)
variants.description: The Short Sword is an upgraded Knife. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

variants.name: Short Sword (Blue)
variants.description: The Short Sword is an upgraded Knife. 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

outfits.name: Ion Killer Cannon
outfits.description: Need something to deal with those pesky missile-chucking pirates? Try out our Ion Killer Cannon! Why, all you have to do is get in range for a second, and ion-pump them! 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

outfits.name: Particle Sniper
outfits.description: What is the most popular feature of the Particle Cannon? It's long range! Well, this gun makes that range better! 	Made entirely by Fire Corporation.

outfits.name: Friendly License
outfits.description: This checks if you are a pirate or not to see if you can buy Fire Corporation ships and outfits.
